title: How can I stop completion dates being changed by users?
excerpt: I would like to see when we are running over time with a task, but without allowing the user to change the date on it, so it puts it back ‘Into Progress’

posts.author: GregMooir (Greg)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to see when we are running over time with a task, but without allowing the user to change the date on it, so it puts it back ‘Into Progress’

posts.author: Jarv (Ian Jarvie)
posts.cookedHtml: at the column header do you have the settings option and then ‘restrict column edit’ feature?
